description: Intelligence Core — Data contribution, scoring engine, benchmark engine, dashboard and benchmarking UI

tasks.title: Intelligence Service — Data contribution and scoring engine
tasks.prompt:
Implement the Intelligence Service covering M4.1 (Data Contribution) and M4.2 (Scoring Engine) as specified in SNAPP-TRD.md.

Create Snapp.Service.Intelligence with:

1. Data Contribution Endpoints:
   POST /api/intel/contribute — submit practice data by dimension. Category validation against Vertical Configuration Pack (for now, load a default dental config from a JSON file in the service). Store PDATA# items in snapp-intel. Calculate per-category ConfidenceContribution from config weights. Recalculate total confidence.
   GET /api/intel/contributions — list user's contributed categories
   GET /api/intel/dashboard — build dashboard: KPIs from available data, confidence score, valuation summary if exists

2. Scoring Engine:
   POST /api/intel/score/compute — compute multi-dimensional score for current user. Evaluate 6 dimensions (Financial Health, Owner Risk, Operations, Client Base, Revenue Diversification, Market Position). Each dimension scored 0-100 based on available signals + contributed data. Produce composite score + confidence level (high/medium/low). Store SCORE# items.
   GET /api/intel/score — get current scoring profile
   GET /api/intel/score/history — get scoring history for trending

3. Benchmark Engine:
   GET /api/intel/benchmarks?specialty={}&geo={}&size={} — get benchmarks for cohort. Return P25/P50/P75 + user's percentile.
   Internal: benchmark recomputation triggered when new data contributed (if cohort has ≥5 contributors). Store BENCH# and COHORT# items.

4. Vertical Configuration: load from src/Snapp.Service.Intelligence/Config/dental-default.json. Define scoring dimensions, weights, thresholds, KPI definitions, and contribution categories for the dental vertical. The config format must be generalizable — other verticals add their own JSON file.

5. Repository: IntelligenceRepository against snapp-intel table.
6. Dockerfile + docker-compose (snapp-intelligence, port 8085). Kong route: /api/intel/*.

Integration tests: contribute data, verify confidence increases, compute score, verify dimensions, benchmark with ≥5 contributors, verify anonymity threshold.
tasks.done_when: Intelligence service runs in Docker. Data contribution, scoring, benchmarking all work. Vertical config loaded. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Practice Dashboard UI
tasks.prompt:
Implement the practice intelligence dashboard using MudBlazor as specified in SNAPP-TRD.md M4.7.

1. Pages/Intelligence/Dashboard.razor (/intelligence):
   - Hero: MudPaper with valuation range card (Downside — **Base** — Upside) if available, or MudAlert prompting first contribution
   - MudGrid layout:
     - MudItem xs=12 md=6: MudChart Type=Donut or radar visualization of 6 scoring dimensions
     - MudItem xs=12 md=6: MudSimpleTable KPI grid (name, value, trend MudIcon, percentile)
     - MudItem xs=12 md=4: MudCard confidence bar (Components/Intelligence/ConfidenceBar.razor)
     - MudItem xs=12 md=4: MudCard career stage indicator (placeholder for S7)
     - MudItem xs=12 md=4: MudCard risk flags (placeholder for S7)
   - MudButton 'Contribute Data' if confidence < 65%
   - MudLink 'View Benchmarks' → /intelligence/benchmark

2. Pages/Intelligence/Contribute.razor (/intelligence/contribute):
   - MudTabs for categories (from vertical config)
   - Dynamic form rendering per category (MudSelect for bands, MudSlider for percentages, MudNumericField for counts)
   - Submit → POST /api/intel/contribute
   - MudAlert showing confidence improvement: '+{N}% confidence'

3. Components/Intelligence/ConfidenceBar.razor:
   - MudProgressLinear segmented by tier: 0-40% Error, 40-65% Warning, 65-85% Info, 85-100% Success
   - MudText with current score and tier label

4. Components/Intelligence/KpiCard.razor:
   - Value + unit (MudText Typo.H4), trend MudIcon (ArrowUpward green / ArrowDownward red / Remove gray), percentile MudProgressLinear if benchmark available

5. bUnit tests.
tasks.done_when: Dashboard renders scoring radar, KPIs, confidence bar. Contribution form works dynamically from config. bUnit tests pass.

tasks.title: Benchmarking UI
tasks.prompt:
Implement benchmarking visualization using MudBlazor as specified in M4.8.

1. Pages/Intelligence/Benchmark.razor (/intelligence/benchmark):
   - Cohort selector: MudSelect Specialty, MudSelect Geography, MudSelect Size Band
   - MudText 'Comparing against {N} peers' (sample size)
   - MudTable with columns: Metric Name, Your Value, P25, P50, P75, Your Percentile
   - Color-coded rows: MudTableRow Class based on position (below P25 = error color, P25-P50 = warning, above P50 = success)
   - MudAlert Severity=Info if sample < 5: 'Not enough data in this cohort yet'

2. Components/Intelligence/PercentileBar.razor:
   - Horizontal MudProgressLinear with P25/P50/P75 markers
   - User's position as a colored dot overlay
   - MudTooltip showing exact percentile

3. bUnit tests.
tasks.done_when: Benchmark page renders with cohort selection, table, percentile bars. bUnit tests pass.

tasks.title: Sprint 6 integration validation
tasks.prompt: Validate Sprint 6. Run all tests. Walkthrough: contribute practice data across multiple categories, watch confidence score increase, view scoring radar chart, view benchmarks with cohort comparison. Write .claude/reports/sprint-6-validation.md.
tasks.done_when: All tests pass. Intelligence layer functional. Validation report written.
